Rent initiation is tough but hitting adulthood? Questionable at best!
Indeed, professions shape lives—sometimes passions evolve alongside us when fascinated by the past!
Habitual pattern-spotting! Can turn any casual stroll through town into an impromptu history lesson relating buildings to eras—occupational hazard or quirky hobby?
